steps.t: Rhiangar Nevit has asked you locate her father, Mayor Cadwallon Nevit, in Tharbad. Tharbad is located in south-west Cardolan.
You have discovered the missing Mayor, but he seems to have been knocked down. You should talk to the Mayor. The Mayor is in Tharbad, in south-east Ca…
Mayor Cadwallon Nevit has asked you to bring him back his thrown staff. The staff is on the road near the Mayor, in Tharbad.
You have rescued the wayward Mayor, Cadwallon Nevit. You should talk to the Mayor and let him know his daughter is waiting for him. Mayor Nevit is in …
